name: triad-territory-rush-server
description: Low-latency classroom gateway with a 12800x8000 arena, stable territory deltas, varied right-triangle questions, swept projectile collisions, automatic ammunition regeneration and dedicated supply assets.

scripts.test: node --check runtime-patch.js && node --check runtime-v6.js && node --check runtime-v7.js && node --check runtime-v8.js && node --check runtime-v9.js && node --check runtime-v10.js && node --check secure-gateway.js && node --check server-v3.js
